session.user: Run `uv run ty check src/erk/tui/commands/types.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors - just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checker on those files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/tui/commands/types.py src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py
Run type checker on specified TUI files

session.assistant:
**ty passed:** All type checks passed for the specified files.
The three files passed type checking: - `src/erk/tui/commands/types.py` - `src/erk/tui/commands/registry.py` - `src/erk/tui/screens/launch_screen.py`
